title: Warm Crumbly Irish Sausage Hash
description: A hearty and savory Irish dish featuring brown rice, air-fried sausage, and a crumbly texture, perfect for a hangover cure or a high-protein breakfast option.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the Irish sausage in the air fryer for 10 minutes, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the air fryer and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, diced potato, and cooked sausage mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg, salt, and black pepper.
Add the egg mixture to the bowl with the rice mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into a large hash shape.
Place the hash in the air fryer and cook for 10 minutes, or until the outside is crispy and golden brown.
Serve the hash hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
